hooks.enforced_via: fresh `git init`/fetch/checkout leaves only inactive .sample hooks; preparation also sets repo-local `core.hooksPath` to an empty dir

index_worktree_state.note: the harness's deterministic dirty state (run_canary_case._construct_git_state for the commit subfamily): the single staged file whose blob + path fully determine the tree delta

purpose: Versioned, frozen pinning of EVERY determinant of the new commit object for php-cs-fixer::git::commit, so the RAW `git commit` and RTK `rtk git commit` produce the SAME full commit OID. The hash is never normalized: if it fails to reproduce, a determinant leaked. A commit OID hashes {tree, parent, author name/email/date, committer name/email/date, message} -- all pinned here; signing + hooks are disabled so neither perturbs the object.
reproducibility_rule: RAW commit OID == RTK commit OID EXACTLY; never normalize the hash.

signing.enforced_via: GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null + GIT_CONFIG_SYSTEM=/dev/null + repo-local `git config commit.gpgsign false` set during preparation
